channel.title: Productivity on Murat Kurkoglu | orioninsist
channel.description: Recent content in Productivity on Murat Kurkoglu | orioninsist

item.title: Why I Threw Away My Mouse (The Shell vs. GUI Debate)
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: Stop clicking. Start commanding. Why the Linux terminal is faster, stronger, and necessary for modern engineering.

item.title: The Black Screen: I Formatted Everything and Now I'm Lost
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: I nuked my GUI. No mouse, no icons, just a blinking cursor. Here is how I survived the first 5 minutes using whoami and pwd.

item.title: GUI-less Screen Capture: The wf-recorder/slurp Guide for Sway
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: Dive into the terminal-only method for perfect screen recording on Arch Linux and Sway/Wayland. Learn to use wf-recorder and slurp for selected-area video capture.

item.title: FEH to SWAYIMG: Mastering Visual Workflow on Sway/Wayland
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: My deep dive into moving from X11's FEH to Wayland-native SWAYIMG on Arch Linux. Learn the Grim + Slurp terminal method for clean, fast screen capture.

item.title: Taming The Glare: Force Dark Mode On All Websites In Chrome
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: Learn the secret Chrome flag, "Auto Dark Mode for Web Contents," to force a dark theme on any website, including platforms like Google Analytics, reducing eye strain.
